groups.description: Grant project access to sets of team members without changing project ownership.
groups.confirmDelete: Delete this group? Members and grants are removed; projects are not deleted.
groups.invites.title: Group invitations
planner.calendar.timelineEmpty: No tasks match the current filters. Add start and due dates on tasks (or start/end on subtasks) to see bars on the timeline.
planner.calendar.timelineHint: Drag bars to shift dates; drag edges to resize. Tasks use start → due; subtasks use start → end.

planner.board.hint: Open a project to view its task board with dynamic grouping.

planner.myTasks.title: My tasks
planner.myTasks.hint: Tasks assigned to you across all teams and projects.
login.title: Sign in
login.twoFactorHelp: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or one of your single-use recovery codes.

dashboard.selectTeamHint: Join a team to see your dashboard.
dashboard.allTeamsSubtitle: Across {n} teams · all projects you can access

security.password.title: Change password
security.password.intro: After saving, you'll be signed out on every device. Sign back in with your new password.
security.password.policyHint: At least 12 characters with letters + digits.
security.password.mismatch: New password and confirmation don't match.
security.password.directoryOwned: Your account is managed by your organisation's directory. Change your password there.
admin.resetPassword.title: Reset password for {email}
admin.resetPassword.intro: Leave the field empty to let the server generate a new password. The user is signed out on every device.
admin.resetPassword.label: New password (optional)
admin.users.title: Users
admin.users.intro: Search, filter, and sort users. Change instance role with the Role column dropdown.
admin.users.col.name: Name
admin.users.empty: No users match the current filters.
admin.users.confirmDelete: Delete {email}? Their projects/tasks/comments survive with "(deleted user)" attribution.
admin.users.confirm.disable: Disable {email}? All active sessions will be revoked immediately.
admin.users.confirm.forceLogout: Force logout {email}? All active sessions will be revoked.
admin.users.selfActionTooltip: You cannot perform this action on your own account.
admin.users.profile.title: Edit profile — {email}
admin.users.profile.name: Name
admin.users.detail.title: User — {email}
team.members.col.name: Name
team.remove.ownsProjects: This member owns projects in this team. Reassign ownership or remove anyway.
team.addMember.typeHint: Type at least 2 characters to search.
team.addMember.existingOnly: The user must already have a ProjectHub account.
customfields.title: Custom fields
customfields.subtitle: Reusable fields for every task in {team}.
customfields.selectTeam: Pick a team to manage custom fields.
customfields.empty: No custom fields yet — create one below.
customfields.name: Field name
customfields.deleteConfirm: Delete field "{name}"? All values on tasks will be removed.
customfields.noAccess: You do not have permission to manage custom fields.
labels.title: Labels
labels.subtitle: Team-wide tags for tasks in {team}.
labels.empty: No labels yet — create one below.
labels.selectTeam: Pick a team to manage its labels.
labels.deleteConfirm: Delete label "{name}"? It will be removed from every task that uses it.
labels.predefined.title: Predefined labels
labels.predefined.subtitle: Global, admin-managed labels available in every team.
labels.predefined.empty: No predefined labels yet — create one below.
deps.title: Dependencies
dependency.type.label: Dependency type
deps.enforcement.warn.label: WARN MODE
deps.enforcement.warn.help: Dependencies aren't enforced on status changes — only surfaced as a warning.
deps.enforcement.block.label: BLOCK MODE
deps.enforcement.block.help: This task can't move to In progress / Done while it has incomplete blockers.
search.title: Search
search.hint: Type a query in the top bar and press Enter.
preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Personal display settings. Changes apply only to your account.
preferences.calendarSubtitle: Affects how dates and timestamps are rendered across the app — task due dates, kanban cards, audit log, comments, the date picker.
preferences.theme.title: Theme
preferences.theme.systemHint: System follows your OS light/dark setting and updates live without reload.
preferences.willReload: The page will reload after saving so every component picks up the change.
prefs.timezone.subtitle: Applies to timestamps only (comments, activity, created/updated times). Task due dates and holidays stay the same for everyone.
prefs.dualCalendar.subtitle: Show both Jalali and Gregorian on task dates (due, start, planned).
prefs.dualCalendar.enable: Show both calendars on key dates
scheduling.title: Working-day scheduling (admin · instance-wide)
scheduling.subtitle: Opt-in rules. When off, due dates and Gantt durations use calendar days exactly as before. Changes apply on the next create, edit, or recurrence spawn — existing stored dates are not rewritten.
scheduling.rollOffdayHint: When a due date (or recurrence spawn due date) lands on a weekend or holiday, move it to the next working day.
scheduling.workingDaysOnlyHint: Recurrence offsets and Gantt duration counts skip weekends and holidays. Bar positions still use calendar dates.
reminders.leadHoursSubtitle: How many hours before a task's due date ProjectHub sends you a TASK_DUE notification (in-app bell and email when SMTP is on).
reminders.leadHoursHint: 1–168 hours (1 week max). Default 24 h matches the previous fixed window. Changing this does not re-send reminders for tasks already notified.
reminders.title: Due reminders (admin · instance-wide)
reminders.subtitle: Optional holiday-aware timing for TASK_DUE notifications. Per-user lead time is set above.
reminders.skipOffDaysHint: When the computed reminder moment falls on a weekend or holiday, send it on the prior working day instead (same time-of-day). If that moment is already past, the reminder fires immediately — still once per due date.
holidays.title: Holidays
holidays.subtitle: Instance-wide specific dates treated as off-days (shown in red on calendars). Distinct from recurring weekend weekdays.
holidays.name: Name
holidays.import.title: Import Iranian holidays
holidays.import.verifyNote: Loads official dates from a bundled offline dataset (no network). Verify religious and lunar holidays against official announcements before relying on them — update or delete any incorrect row after import.
about.title: About ProjectHub
about.helpHint: Need help? Open the user manual via the 📖 button (top-right), or contact your ProjectHub administrator.
about.https.warningBody: This instance is served over an insecure connection (HTTP). Browsers require HTTPS before users can install ProjectHub as an app. Enable HTTPS on your reverse proxy (for example Caddy with a valid certificate) to make the PWA installable.
budget.currencyChangeNote: Changing the currency does not convert amounts — only the displayed currency label changes. Continue?
budget.taskUsesProjectCurrency: Amounts use the parent project's currency (not converted).
projects.edit.title: Edit project
projects.edit.name: Name
projects.status.title: Project status
projects.status.loadError: Could not load the status. The project may not exist or you don't have access.
projects.budget.label: Budget
projects.delegates.title: Full-edit delegates
projects.delegates.hint: Grant each person specific edit capabilities on this project. "Full edit" includes everything (incl. the normally manager-only dates and responsible).
projects.delegates.none: No team members to delegate to.
projects.dateRange.invalid: End date must be on or after start date
projects.edit.nameOnlyHint: You can rename this project only. Other fields are read-only for managers on projects you do not own.
projects.code.hint: Short unique code (max 30 chars). Only visible to owner and admins.
projects.health.title: Set project health
